# CWE-281 — Improper Preservation of Permissions (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-281-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Safe: copies content then reapplies source permission bits.
func BackupConfig(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	src := "/etc/app/config.toml"
	dst := "/backups/config.toml"
	info, err := os.Stat(src)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "stat", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	in, _ := os.Open(src)
	out, _ := os.OpenFile(dst, os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY|os.O_TRUNC, info.Mode())
	_, _ = io.Copy(out, in)
	in.Close()
	out.Close()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
